label: Simple 4-Prompt Experimental

prompt_stages.pass_1_creative_story: Create one complete, source-grounded radio story from the selected source material, story model, tone guardrails, and forbidden patterns. Do not output JSON in this pass.
prompt_stages.pass_2_creative_ledger_fill: Use the finished story to fill the production story ledger with cast, lines, beats, source metadata, coda/source note, and visual directives.
prompt_stages.pass_3_technical_schema_cleanup: Repair the ledger JSON so it satisfies required fields, enum values, ids, source fields, and downstream schema expectations.
prompt_stages.pass_4_technical_ledger_audit: Audit and repair cast/character references, speaker roles, beat ids, line ids, continuity, source note, visual directives, and downstream invariants. If the ledger cannot be made valid, fail loudly.
prompt_stages.optional_adaptive_cleanup_decision: After deterministic validators run, decide whether another approved technical cleanup pass is needed. Recommend only a cleanup target, an approved local technical model, and a short cleanup prompt. Python owns the stop condition.

examples: A stronger model writes a rich story first, then fills and repairs the ledger in technical passes.
tone_guardrails: Python should validate and repair structure, not secretly co-write the story.
No fallback to legacy_many_pass if this experiment fails.
Adaptive cleanup may continue only under a hard max pass cap and deterministic validator failures.
source_requirements: Any selected source bank must provide a valid source packet and story pack.
ledger_validation_notes: Pass 4 must check cast vs line speakers, character ids, beat ids, line ids, source metadata, coda/source note, and visual directives.
Optional adaptive cleanup stops when deterministic validators pass or max_cleanup_passes is reached.
